case_title: TAYLOR, ALINE M. VS FREIBERG, HARRY IND/DBA SALVAGE STORE FIXTURES

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO ALINE A TAYLOR RETURNED NO SUCH NUMBER.
